LanguageData.VQE_Cryptoforge_Chapter1.questDescriptio:
questDescription(asker_factionLeader==True)->[asker_nameDef], [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name], has contacted us with news of a long-lost pre-war mobile base crawler. Generations ago, the platform broke apart during a catastrophic deployment failure, scattering its fabrication sections across the frozen wastes. To locate them, we must reactivate an ancient scanning relay station.
[asker_nameDef] says the scans will pinpoint the locations of the crawler's forward and rear sections, which should hold the data needed to identify the final and most important fragment: the fabrication core. However, the relay station remains heavily defended by automated turrets and dense minefields. The scan itself is also expected to draw nearby mechanoids.
Complete the scans on both relays to discover the location of the crawler fragments.

questDescription(askerIsNull==True)->We've uncovered information about a long-lost pre-war mobile base crawler. The platform appears to have broken apart during a failed deployment, scattering its fabrication sections across the frozen wastes. To locate them, we must reactivate an ancient scanning relay station.
Running the scans should reveal the positions of the crawler's forward and rear sections, each likely containing clues to the location of the final fabrication core. The relay station is still heavily defended by automated turrets and minefields, and the power surge is likely to attract nearby mechanoids.
Complete the scans on both relays to discover the location of the crawler fragments.
